Petition To Compel Trustees To Account
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hee Kim made a limited appearance for Ernesto Gonzalez (Respondent). Luis Molina for and with Norma Massagli (Petitioner).

Counsel reported that mediation was held, that they were unable to settle the case, that there was an issue of not having an accounting and a dispute over the property located in Nicaragua. The Parties agreed to a settlement conference. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Account was continued to July 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will notify Counsel as to the time and location of the settlement conference.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui.

Petition To Compel Trustees To Account
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Continued To Feb-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Louis Molina for Norma Massagli. Tom Miller for Ernesto Gonzalez.

Mr. Molina stated that he just entered into this case a couple of weeks ago, that the matter is ripe for mediation, and that they want information from the other side. Mr. Miller stated that it has been difficult in the transfer of information since this has gone from one attorney to another. Mr. Molina stated that he understands that some bank records are missing, that they are trying to do this informally, that his client did request that he file objections to their response, but that they are trying to work together. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 16, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 18, 2011. Status on mediation is set for February 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR#11216. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

Petition To Compel Trustees To Account
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Luis Molina for Petitioner.

Mr. Molina requested a two week continuance. The matter was continued to November 24, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
